name: qa
description: All-in-one QA + quality-management toolkit for Claude Code; commands are namespaced /qa:<name>. Serves QA/QC engineers, QA Managers/Leads and Product Ops. scaffold creates a standard Page Object Model project from scratch (Playwright-Web or Appium-App) — a fresh repo gets a compiling framework + an example login test, then users just /qa:plan-tests. Automation (Playwright Web + Appium iOS/Android), auto-routing by platform (web/android/ios) to load only the matching skill: scaffold/sitemap/exploratory/plan-tests/find-elements/cook/run/fix/analyze/count-cases/review/push-code/merge-request. sitemap crawls the whole app/web (or one feature) to declare every screen's elements + build the navigation map — discovery only, no tests/bugs. Manual QA with distinct command names: analyze-spec/plan-gen-testcases/gen-testcases/count-testcases/est-sp/explain-bug/check-duplicate-bug/log-bug/update-board. Quality management & reporting (read-only, for managers/ops): quality-report (metrics dashboard), bug-analysis (deep board analysis of any board over a range — adaptive status grouping + root causes + spike days), release-gate (Go/No-Go), traceability (RTM spec↔test↔bug), release-notes (internal changelog + user-facing notes), risk (risk matrix), triage (RICE), sla (SLA compliance), postmortem (blameless incident RCA + action items).
